mapper.select:
SELECT n.*, u.real_name as publisherName FROM notice n LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON n.publisher_id = u.id
n.status = 'PUBLISHED'
AND n.type = #{type}
AND (n.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR n.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY n.priority DESC, n.publish_time DESC
